data.body: Pushed to Gerrit as change 828 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/828). Implemented: new reusable _build-and-test.yml (lint+pip-audit+test matrix, checkout parameterized by gerrit-refspec, no secrets); test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml both delegate to it (net -749/+580); parity test rewritten to the single-source invariant + naming test updated. Local gates green: actionlint on all 3 workflows, make lint (ruff+format+zizmor+actionlint), 42 workflow-structure tests (parity/naming/actionlint-scope/external-canary/verify-opcert), pre-commit (lint+typecheck). Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.
